arts.ttl: Flick focuses on Ferran after Barca lose Lewandowski to injury
arts.sum: The forward was spotted having a long one-on-one chat with manager Hansi Flick in training on Monday ahead of Tuesday’s clash against Real Mallorca. More goals will be needed during the run-in, and Flick is backing the Spain international to deliver over the next few weeks.

arts.ttl: Barcelona Predicted Lineup vs. Mallorca: La Liga
arts.sum: Ferran Torres should replace the injured Robert Lewandowski in the lineup when Barcelona host Mallorca in La Liga.

arts.ttl: Tah confirms Bayer Leverkusen exit amid Barca transfer talk
arts.sum: Jonathan Tah has confirmed he is set to leave Bayer Leverkusen in the summer and has made the club aware of his decision. He’s now confirmed that he is into his final few months as a Leverkusen player.

arts.ttl: Luis Diaz on Liverpool future amid transfer exit talk, with Barcelona, Saudi Pro League interested
arts.sum: Liverpool winger Luis Diaz speaks out on his future amid rumours that he could leave Anfield for Barcelona or the Saudi Pro League in the summer.

arts.ttl: Barcelona vs Mallorca: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Previewing Barcelona vs Mallorca in La Liga, with TV & live stream details, team news, predicted lineups & score prediction.

arts.ttl: Barcelona transfer news and rumours: Deco addresses future of veteran player as questions about "next season" arise
arts.sum: Barcelona sporting director Deco addresses the future of one of the club's veteran players amidst speculation that he could leave before the start of next season.

arts.ttl: La Liga to reject Barcelona fixture change request after letter
arts.sum: Barcelona have requested that their clash with Real Valladolid be brought forward in order to help with their Champions League semi-final preparations. Despite the Blaugrana sending a formal request to La Liga, the league are set to reject their petition. On Friday, Barcelona manager Hansi Flick expunged a furious rant about the scheduling in Spain, […] The post La Liga to reject Barcelona fixture change request after letter appeared first on Football España.
